overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a desert suburban street at sunset. The player passes palm trees and trash bins while approaching a large holographic billboard tower, with the warm orange light of golden hour illuminating the run-down residential buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert suburban street with palm trees and trash bins

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past green dumpsters and palm trees

notable_agents.action: car driving past on the left side of the street

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining both sides of the street
large green trash bins overflowing with garbage bags
run-down single-story houses with corrugated metal roofs
tall circular structure with rotating holographic advertisements glowing in the distance
wooden utility poles with multiple power lines crisscrossing above

segments.scene_description: Walking along a desert suburban sidewalk lined with tall palm trees and green dumpsters overflowing with trash. The setting sun casts long shadows across the run-down residential buildings, while a massive holographic billboard tower glows in the distant center of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: looking up at palm tree canopy against sunset sky

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the palm tree canopy and colorful sunset sky
camera tilts back down to return to street-level view

agents.ego_description: pausing to look up at the sky while continuing to walk forward

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts dramatically upward to gaze at the palm tree silhouettes against a vibrant sunset sky with scattered clouds. The holographic billboard remains visible in the distance but viewed from below, before the camera returns to street level.

agents.ego_description: walking toward the glowing holographic tower with increasing detail visible

entered.detail: various vehicles parked along the left curb including sedans and trucks

segments.scene_description: Continuing down the street toward the massive holographic billboard tower, which grows larger on the left side of the frame. Parked cars line the street, and the run-down residential buildings continue on both sides under the warm sunset lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: close to holographic tower with military vehicle

events.description: large military truck comes into view parked near the holographic tower

agents.ego_description: approaching the base of the holographic tower and passing parked vehicles

notable_agents.action: military truck parked on the street near the holographic tower

entered.detail: large camouflaged military transport truck with covered cargo bed

segments.scene_description: Walking very close to the massive holographic billboard tower, which now dominates the left side of the frame with its glowing rotating advertisements. A large military truck is parked ahead near the tower base, and the camera passes more parked cars along the sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey down a desert suburban street that transitions from a wide view of a run-down neighborhood toward the overwhelming scale of a holographic billboard tower. It begins by moving along a sidewalk lined with tall palm trees and overflowing green dumpsters, with the setting sun casting long shadows across weathered residential buildings. As the camera briefly tilts upward to capture the silhouettes of the palms against a vibrant, clouded sunset sky, the distant glow of the billboard remains a focal point before the perspective returns to street level. The scene then progresses further down the road, passing parked cars as the holographic tower grows larger and shifts toward the left side of the frame. Finally, the camera approaches the base of the massive structure, where rotating advertisements dominate the view and a large military truck sits parked beside the sidewalk.
